root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_stock ,coalesce( ( select sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) , 0 ) as sum_prin_bal ,
pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as salary_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharemonthly(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_amount , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_period_payment(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '9' ) as period_9 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_period_payment(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '2' ) as period_2 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_period_payment(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '6' ) as period_6 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_period_payment(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '3' ) as period_3 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_period_payment(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '4' ) as period_4 ,
PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '9' ) as prin_bal_9 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '2' ) as prin_bal_2 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '6' ) as prin_bal_6 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '3' ) as prin_bal_3 , PKB_KTM.fp_get_loan_balance_type(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '4' ) as prin_bal_4
,coalesce( ( select sum( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ) from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type in ( '2','6' ) and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = ( select max( max_con.begining_of_contract ) from sc_lon_m_contract max_con where max_con.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and max_con.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and max_con.loan_type in ( '2','6' ) )
) , 0 ) as loan_app_norm
,coalesce( ( select sum( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance ) from sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status <> 'C' and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = '30' ) , 0 ) as dep_bal_30
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
